name: Christian Family Church
description: Christian Family Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Owatonna, MN. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Morehouse Park
description: Morehouse Park is a place to play pickleball in Owatonna, MN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Northern Sneaky Cat
description: Northern Sneaky Cat is a place to play pickleball in Owatonna, MN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: Sid Kenyon Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Sid Kenyon Courts in Owatonna, MN! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.
